demo.title: Deposit into a charity vault
demo.code:
deposit $25 into Money for Trees

-> approves 25 USDC to the Money vault on Base, then deposits it.
   You receive 25 Money (a 1:1 charity deposit receipt), redeemable
   1:1 anytime. The vault's yield funds tree-planting.

setup: Requires the Bankr skill with an API key configured
Fund your Bankr wallet with USDC on Base
Enable arbitrary contract calls (Bankr Security -> keep 'Disable arbitrary contract calls' OFF)
Deposit: say `deposit $25 into Money for Trees` (or run `./scripts/deposit.sh money 25`)
